description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a wood grain finish, featuring a prominent headboard that incorporates open shelving for storage or display. The bed frame is constructed with clean, straight lines and a low profile, giving it a contemporary appearance. Along both sides of the bed, there are three pull-out drawers, providing additional storage space beneath the sleeping surface. The headboard and drawer fronts are accented with a slightly lighter wood tone, creating a subtle two-tone effect. The sleeping surface is flat and unadorned, with no visible mattress or bedding. The overall design emphasizes functionality and storage, making it suitable for compact urban living spaces.
description: A modern, wood-finished platform bed with integrated headboard shelving and side storage drawers, featuring a clean, two-tone design. The bed is low-profile and lacks visible bedding or mattress.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard with open shelving and the flat sleeping surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three pull-out drawers beneath the bed and the depth of the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and the shelving compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the additional set of three drawers and the bed's overall length.
